title: Medical emergency aisle clearance
steps: Notify venue medical command and identify the nearest section, aisle, and elevator bank.
Create a clear response corridor with stewards and security while nearby fans remain calm.
Pause nonessential movement in the affected seating block until medical staff confirm clearance.
escalation_trigger: Escalate when the route to the medical room is blocked, the guest is unresponsive, or crowd movement prevents access.

title: Weather disruption shelter flow
steps: Move fans away from exposed stairways, open plazas, and temporary structures.
Open covered concourse capacity and keep accessible pathways unobstructed.
Coordinate transport and PA updates every ten minutes until the disruption is resolved.
escalation_trigger: Escalate when lightning protocols activate, standing water blocks egress, or crowd density rises in covered zones.

title: Security concern containment
steps: Confirm the concern with the zone supervisor before changing crowd flow.
Create a calm buffer around the affected area and keep accessible routes open.
Use neutral PA language that redirects fans without identifying sensitive details.
escalation_trigger: Escalate when fan movement stops, a gate must close, or command requests a restricted-area response.
